description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with clean lines, flat roofs, and a mix of glass, metal, and concrete materials. The structure is composed of two main levels, with large windows providing ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. The exterior includes landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, as well as a paved driveway and a small patio or terrace. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections possibly used as terraces or green roofs. The entryway is defined by a covered porch and a prominent front door, accessible via a short set of steps. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A sleek, modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped grounds, and a prominent entryway. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and contemporary materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped garden, and a clear view of the flat roof and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, extensive use of glass, and the landscaped perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio or terrace area, additional greenery, and the back entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage area, and more of the flat roof and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a prominent modern door, short steps, and minimalistic landscaping
